ResearchProjectDef.label: ashbound capacitance
ResearchProjectDef.description: Primitive infernal buffering. These first-generation capacitor housings let the circle hold a controlled reserve of hostile charge instead of depending entirely on raw grid spikes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: rift capacitance matrices
ResearchProjectDef.description: Interlocking phase-matrices and constrained rift chambers dramatically increase capacitor throughput, allowing the circle to feed heavier ritual loads without immediate collapse.

ResearchProjectDef.label: crown condensation arrays
ResearchProjectDef.description: Late-stage abyssal condenser architecture built around crown lattices, pressure shunts and hardened infernal collars. This is the first capacitor class that truly feels boss-ready.
